title: jasione montana subsp. stolonifera
intro: Jasione montana subsp. stolonifera, also known as the creeping bellflower, is a subspecies of the Jasione montana plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the bellflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Jasione montana subsp. stolonifera include its ability to help reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and promote digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in natural medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
